summary: refactor: optimize hot paths, dedupe canvas/abort helpers, fix a11y gaps

decisions.title: Extract shared canvas/abort utils instead of per-module copies
decisions.rationale: canvasToBlob/decode/render fallback logic was duplicated across 5 modules (pdfService, cropImage, compressImage, compressWorker, createThumbnail); single utils/canvas.ts + utils/abort.ts removes ~90 lines and keeps OffscreenCanvas fallback behavior in one place

rejected_alternatives.reason: DRY violation already caused divergent implementations

side_effects: compressWorker bundle now imports utils/canvas (negligible size)

decisions.title: Cache image order counter in OcrDatabase
decisions.rationale: getNextOrder() ran one indexed query per added page; bulk PDF imports issued O(n) queries. Promise-guarded init keeps max(order)+1 semantics and resets on deleteAllImages
side_effects: order gaps possible if a persist fails after counter increment (harmless)

decisions.title: Batch thumbnail flush (12/page batch) in PdfPageSelectDialog
decisions.rationale: per-page setState re-rendered the whole grid once per page; large PDFs hit hundreds of renders

decisions.title: Skip status recount on streaming text updates in pagesStore
decisions.rationale: UPDATE_PAGE recounted all page statuses on every 50ms progress tick although counts only change with status transitions

decisions.title: Typed error names in fetchImageFromUrl; strict OcrEventMap; theme tokens for status badges; i18n for ImagePreview aria-labels
decisions.rationale: message-substring error classification was fragile; Record<string,unknown> intersection disabled event-name typo checking; hardcoded hex colors ignored dark theme; hardcoded Chinese aria-labels broke en locale screen readers

bugs.symptom: Photos with XMP APP1 segment before EXIF never got orientation-corrected
bugs.root_cause: readExifOrientation returned 1 on the first non-EXIF APP1 segment instead of skipping it
bugs.fix: Skip non-EXIF APP1 segments and continue scanning; stop at SOS marker
bugs.lesson: JPEG can contain multiple APP1 segments; EXIF is not guaranteed to be first
